steps.title: Set x to zero
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept occurs where $x=0$. Substitute $0$ into the function.
$$y=8(4)^{0+2}$$

steps.title: Compute the coordinate
steps.content:
Evaluate the power and multiply.
$$y=8(4^2)=8(16)=128$$
So the intercept has $x$-coordinate $0$ and $y$-coordinate $128$. The answer is C.
